epic_goal: Harden VIDA framework execution efficiency and autonomous follow-through, including approval-loop behavior, reporting continuity, mandatory catch-review coverage, protocol self-diagnosis, and other runtime protocol-drift corrections needed for long-running autonomous development.
task_title: Canonicalize tracked writer execution when eligible analysis/review lanes are unavailable
done: Validated execution-auth route fix with focused regression suite, config validation, live gate pass for vida-stack-2d9.8.4, and independent review clean after follow-up tightening
task_context: Under epic vida-stack-2d9.8, fix the framework gap surfaced by vida-stack-2d9.8.3 where tracked writer blocks can become route-blocked with no eligible analysis lane and no eligible verifier/coach, forcing bounded main-lane self-diagnosis remediation instead of a canonical tracked path. Define and implement lawful task/route behavior for this case, including nearest protocol/runtime/test coverage, so tracked framework work either has a proper override/escalation path or fails in a way that does not require unsynchronized writer execution.
